prevalence.source: ENT and vestibular disorder epidemiology syntheses

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; dizziness and fall risk

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Acute vertigo with hearing symptoms; exclude stroke; audiometry/vestibular testing when indicated

publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: Hundreds of thousands of cases across EU
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with vestibular rehab and symptomatic therapy

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Clinical diagnosis with access to vestibular testing in ENT services
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Vestibular suppressants short-term, antiemetics, vestibular rehabilitation
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access to vestibular rehab in some regions
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong ENT services and rehabilitation access
